notes: Surface-deployed fabrication printers specialized for heavy industrial equipment: refineries, miners, prospectors, and other printers.
printer_type: industrial — can only build recipes whose output category is one of: refinery, miner, prospector, robonaut, printer.
construction_rate_kg_per_hr increases with tech level, scaling build speed.
Multiple printers in 'construct' mode at the same facility pool their rates.
Draws electric_mw from the surface power bus during active operations.
